headline: How The General Mills (GIS) Story Is Shifting As Expectations And Risks Reset
summary: The latest analyst update trims General Mills’ modeled fair value only slightly, from US$40.89 to US$40.58, signaling a modest reset rather than a wholesale rethink of the story. That small move lines up with research that splits between bulls, who see current prices as already reflecting pressure in North America Retail, and bears, who read recent target cuts into the low to mid US$40s as a sign that expectations have been reset. As you read on, you will see how these different views are...

headline: Passive Income Investors Are Grabbing These 6% Dividend Stocks Hand-Over-Fist
summary: Investors love dividend stocks because they provide dependable passive income streams and an excellent opportunity for solid total return. Total return includes interest, capital gains, dividends, and distributions realized over time.
